name: Die Brug
overview: Die Brug sees strangers join forces in a remote wilderness location to complete an epic challenge that will test their physical strength and mental acuity. Contestants must work together to build a several hundred meters long bridge to an island, where a cash prize of R1 million is hidden. But just one contestant will walk away with the prize and must decide whether to share it or take it all for themselves.

trailers.title: Amptelike voorskou – Die brug | S1 | Ep 0 | kykNET
